a:r.a:t: Plan component complexity – Telemarketing (93 plan variations)
93 legacy job titles compress into 13 consolidated roles, but plan logic is still split across activation, package sales, and leadership layers.
Role mapping summary | Consolidated Roles List
Plan family summary | Consolidated Comp Plans
Largest role roll-up: Telemarketing Rep - Activation/Tours consolidates 26 legacy titles.
• Most reused family: Activation / tours frontline aligns manager, supervisor, and rep roles to the same monthly Tours blueprint.
• Residual complexity: package sales and leadership tiers still create 11 additional blueprints beyond that shared design.
Blueprints = unique measure + cadence signatures; plan families are grouped for readability, and comp-plan role counts can be more granular than the roles tab.
